extraction.one_line_summary: DANESE Alberto won a photo finish sprint after a 192km breakaway was caught at 5km to go, edging MILAN Jonathan by a tire width.
tactical_patterns: MILAN Jonathan blocked from intermediate sprint breakaway by MATTHEWS who considered him too dangerous for points competition.
LARSSON Senne solo attack at 22km lasted until 5km, suggesting sprinter teams waited too long to chase down numeric advantage.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: launching from distance mixed successfully with pure sprinters, suggesting underrated top-end speed or tactical surprise value
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: negative: missed breakaway opportunity for points despite nearly 100-point maglia ciclamino lead, showing teams actively gatekeeping his advancement
